title: Cult of Cobblemon
description: Modpack for the Twitch "Cult of Cobblemon" community server.
body:
This modpack is mainly designed for a German Twitch community server by the same name, and to bring every player on it a wild and immersive mix between two of the most addictive things there are! Minecraft and Pokémon!

Please note that this does not include most server side mods and data packs. So, using this "as is", you would miss out on a lot of the full experience when playing this on a single-player world or a different server.

However, this modpack includes a custom datapack for more options in botany pots and compatibility to plants from cobblemon. 
A customized version of [cobbreeding](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobbreeding) - with added support to breed cobblemon sizes and additional information in egg tooltips for egg filtering. Such as how many IVs are perfect, the size, or if it is shiny.
And a reduced version of [CCC + MAL Ressourcepack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/complete-cobblemon-collection-w-legendary-spawns), to avoid conflicts with Megashowdown

What are the main points you can expect from this modpack?
Expect a lot of cobblemon content, including trainer battle based level progression and all forms of gimmicks. 
A ton of the usual optimization and beautification mods.
Some mods for storage management - like refined storage or sophisticated storage.
As well ways to make adventuring a bit more enjoyable, trough Waystones and Xaero's maps!
